title: Everything You Need to Know About Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Can't sell your digital products online because PayPal restricts your country or your bank isn't compatible with Stripe? You're not alone. Thousands of creators worldwide face this challenge every day. Today, we're talking about one crucial tool that can help you take control of your online sales: transaction logs. Let's dive into the details and explore how this can revolutionize your digital product business.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Transaction logs are a record of every single sale, payment, and delivery of your digital products. This may seem simple, but it's actually a game-changer for creators in restricted countries or with banking limitations. With transaction logs, you can keep track of every order, verify payments, and even automate delivery of your digital products. This transparency and control are essential for building trust with your customers and growing your online sales.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Under the hood, transaction logs are made possible by advanced technology that connects your digital product store to a highly secure and decentralized payment network. This network allows for instant automated delivery of your digital products and real-time analytics, giving you unparalleled visibility into your sales performance. The Admin Dashboard, a tool specifically designed for this purpose, provides a user-friendly interface to manage all your transaction logs, orders, and payments in one place.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Our solution is specifically designed for digital creators in countries where PayPal and other popular payment platforms are restricted. We're talking about creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, Philippines, and other countries who face unique challenges in selling their digital products online. Our transaction logs and Admin Dashboard are tailored to meet the needs of these creators, providing a reliable and secure way to manage their online sales.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard is a critical component of our transaction log system, providing a centralized hub for managing all your orders, payments, and delivery records. This tool seamlessly integrates with our payment network, ensuring that every sale is securely processed and instantly delivered to your customers. With the Admin Dashboard, you can see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world – giving you complete control over your online sales.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the importance of transaction logs, it's time to take action. Start by setting up your digital product store using the Unchained Commerce Shop, and then connect it to the Admin Dashboard for seamless transaction logging and management. Don't forget to configure your payment settings to ensure secure and instant payment processing. With these steps, you'll be well on your way to building a thriving digital product business that's not held back by payment restrictions or banking limitations.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal? You can sell an ebook online without PayPal by using a decentralized payment network and a digital product store that allows for instant automated delivery of your ebook. Our solution, powered by the Admin Dashboard, provides a secure and reliable way to manage your online sales and deliver your ebooks to customers worldwide.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.

Your Action Checklist

To get started with transaction logs and the Admin Dashboard, follow these concrete steps: Set up your digital product store using the Unchained Commerce Shop, Connect your store to the Admin Dashboard for seamless transaction logging and management, Configure your payment settings to ensure secure and instant payment processing, Use the Admin Dashboard to manage all your transaction logs, orders, and payments in one place, and Finally, enjoy the peace of mind that comes with knowing every sale is securely processed and instantly delivered to your customers.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
